description: This file defines the AuthLocalStore class that manages local authentication data, including session persistence, session loading, clearing session, hashing passwords, and generating tokens, using shared preferences and cryptographic utilities.

classes.name: AuthLocalStore
classes.description: A class that provides methods to store, retrieve, and manage authentication session data locally using shared preferences, as well as utility functions for password hashing and token generation.

methods.name: loadSession
methods.description: Loads the current authentication session from local storage, returns AuthSession object or null if none exists or data is invalid.

methods.name: saveSession
methods.description: Saves the provided AuthSession object into local storage.

methods.name: clearSession
methods.description: Removes the stored session data from local storage.

methods.name: hashPassword
methods.description: Hashes a password string using SHA256 for local-only authentication fallback.

methods.name: newToken
methods.description: Generates a new UUID-based token for offline session.
